name: Yo mama
description: $yomama is an IP coin based on the popular animated web-series, Yo Mama! The purpose of the coin is to prove the thesis of Creator Capital Markets. Whereby the trading fees are directed back into content production. With the community focusing on the culture of yo mama jokes. Bringing back the classic roasts into modern day culture. The daily goal is to merge both the Web2 and Web3 audience behind a single brand. Creating a seamless culture between the two worlds.
